source: Chang 2012 doctoral thesis, HKUST Research Portal
claim_enabled_now: external mechanism support for stress-state-conditioned, phase-aware suffusion activation and primary-data acquisition variables
claim_blocked_now: quantitative residual validation against Chang 2012 until legal full-text tables, curves, or author data are extracted and uncertainty-audited
ethical_constraint: use this gate as mechanism and acquisition support only; do not cite it as calibrated residual validation
